book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

verses.text: Of players who have become Christians.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: And of them also it must be sought that if anyone wishes to come to the grace of Christianity from any ludicrous art (ludicra arte) and to remain free of that stain, it be not lawful for anyone to induce him or compel him to return to the performance of the same things again.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Whoever has turned away from the stage to adopt an honest life, shall not be led back thereto.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This is Canon vij. of the Synod of Carthage, June 15 (or 16), a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This canon is probably to be understood of slaves bought by their masters for the service of the Circ, or Theatre.
